ref: “One of my young goats,” he answered. “What will you give me to keep until you send the goat?” she asked.
text: Na ɔsee dɛ, Mebɛma wɔdze apɔnkyeba fi mbowa no mu abrɛ wo. Na obisaa no dɛ, Ebɛma me ahobadze bi ma ɔdze ekodu dɛ ebɛma wɔdze aba?
translated: And he said, I will send you a colt from among the animals. And he asked him, Will you give me a pledge until you send it?

ref: But before he got there, they saw him coming and made plans to kill him.
text: Na no nuanom no hun no ekyirkyiikyir, na ansaana ɔrebɛn hɔn no, wɔkɔr ne tsir do apam dɛ woboku no.
translated: And his brothers hated him intensely, and before he reached them, they conspired to kill him.

ref: I have chosen him to teach his family to obey me forever and to do what is right and fair. If they do, I will give Abraham many descendants, just as I promised.”
text: Na masan mu eyi no, ama ɔaahyɛ ne mba nye ne fifo a wodzi n’ekyir, ma woeesie EWURADZE no kwan, wɔayɛ pɛrpɛr nye atsɛmbu; ama EWURADZE dze dza ɔaka no wɔ Abraham ho no aaba mu.
translated: As for me, this is my covenant with you: You will be the father of many nations. You will no longer be called Abram; your name will be Abraham, for I have made you a father of many nations. I will make you very fruitful; I will make nations of you, and kings will come from you. I will establish my covenant as an everlasting covenant between me and you and your descendants after you for the generations to come, to be your God and the God of your descendants after you. The whole land of Canaan, where you now reside as a foreigner, I will give as an everlasting possession to you and your descendants after you; and I will be their God.

ref: Jacob worked seven years for Laban, but the time seemed like only a few days, because he loved Rachel so much.
text: Na Rahel ntsi Jakob soom mfe esuon; na ɔdɔ a ɔdɔ no ntsi, ɔyɛɛ n’enyi do dɛ nda kumaabi.
translated: Because of Rachel, Jacob worked for seven years; and because of the love he had for her, it seemed to him but a few days.

ref: When they were outside, one of the angels said, “Run for your lives! Don't even look back. And don't stop in the valley. Run to the hills, where you'll be safe.”
text: Na ɔbaa dɛ, wɔdze hɔn puei no, wɔsee dɛ, Hom nguan wɔ hom nkwa ntsi; mma hom mmbu hom kɔn ekyir, mma hom nngyina Tɛtɛr yi mu beebiara so; hom guan nkɔ bepɔw no do, ɔno bɛyɛ na hom ahyew.
translated: Then, when they were driven out, they were told, Flee for your lives; do not look behind you, and do not stay anywhere in the plain; flee to the mountain, lest you be consumed.
